reviews.review_title: The best not horror or any mods fan game
reviews.review_description: This is the best gtag fan game that is not a horror or a knockoff of gtag 5 stars🥇

Whole map perfect all the only thing there just ain’t that much content but super fun the game is good but there could be more content also I tried to put on cosmetics and it doesn’t let me the mods and the owner is active if your having a bad day play this game

reviews.review_title: A other great gorilla fan game
reviews.review_description: It really has a nice feeling of old gorilla tag also I want mods sonix anyways yeah it’s good

reviews.review_title: It is such a great game
reviews.review_description: The game has a very good community with all of the moderators and even the owner being really nice to me. This game is really underrated and should have way more content made by people. ￼

￼ I’m one of the mods for the game and it’s such a W to be a part of this amazing game amazing community and overall the best time of my life. I can’t wait to make new friends and meet new people and help the game grow and grow

developer_response.body: thank you very much and whats your discord user?
